title: Northland Pro Fiber Connection Extension for Council Meeting Broadcasting
summary: IT Director requests extension of existing fiber agreement with Northland Pro for the connection between City Hall and WCNY on West Fayette Street used for recording and broadcasting council meetings. Extension needed while full RFP process is prepared. Connection is fiber-only and does not include post-production support. Council raises questions about YouTube live streaming quality; directed to contact WCNY directly.
